description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New (Published: July 22, 2026)

Starting August 31, 2026 (Reiwa 8, Monday), Hanno City Hall's main phone line (973-2111) will use automated voice guidance. As a result, extension numbers for each department will change.

We are also beginning call recording to improve service quality.

Changes to department extension numbers

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/kikakuka/13880.html
summary: ℹ️ Automated phone guidance and call recording system to begin
